Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Scene count:', j.szenen?.length\); console.log\('First scene ort_ids:', j.szenen?.[0]?.ort_ids\); console.log\('Scenes with ort_ids:', j.szenen?.filter\(s => s.ort_ids?.length > 0\).length\);")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT ca.fig_id, f.fig_id as f_fig_id, f.name FROM character_arcs ca LEFT JOIN figures f ON f.fig_id = ca.fig_id AND f.book_id = ca.book_id LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM figures; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM continuity_checks; SELECT fig_id, name FROM figures LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT id, book_id, name, rolle FROM figures WHERE name LIKE '%Robert%';")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT id, book_id, fig_id, name, kurzname, typ, beruf, substr\(beschreibung,1,200\) FROM figures WHERE name LIKE '%Robert%';")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT id, book_id, fig_id, name, kurzname, typ, geburtstag, geschlecht, beruf, sozialschicht, beschreibung FROM figures WHERE id=61;")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT id, book_id, fig_id, name, typ FROM figures WHERE book_id=1 ORDER BY sort_order, id;")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT page_id, fig_id FROM figure_appearances WHERE fig_id='fig_13' AND book_id=1;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT fs.kapitel, fs.seite, fs.titel, substr\(fs.kommentar,1,400\) FROM figure_scenes fs JOIN scene_figures sf ON fs.id=sf.scene_id WHERE fs.book_id=1 AND sf.fig_id='fig_13';")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM pages WHERE book_id=1;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/bd/ClaudeProjects/bookstack-lektorat/lektorat.db "SELECT r.from_fig_id, f1.name AS from_name, r.to_fig_id, f2.name AS to_name, r.typ, r.beschreibung, r.machtverhaltnis FROM figure_relations r LEFT JOIN figures f1 ON f1.fig_id=r.from_fig_id AND f1.book_id=r.book_id LEFT JOIN figures f2 ON f2.fig_id=r.to_fig_id AND f2.book_id=r.book_id WHERE r.book_id=1 AND \(r.from_fig_id='fig_13' OR r.to_fig_id='fig_13'\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Servers:', d.get\('servers'\)\); print\('Paths with wordrelations:'\); [print\(' ', p\) for p in d.get\('paths',{}\) if 'wordrelation' in p.lower\(\) or 'synonym' in p.lower\(\)]; print\('All paths \(first 30\):'\); [print\(' ', p\) for p in list\(d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:30]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); german = [c.get\('corpusName'\) for c in d if 'deu' in \(c.get\('corpusName'\) or ''\).lower\(\)]; print\('German corpora \(first 20\):'\); [print\(' ', c\) for c in german[:20]]; print\('total german:', len\(german\)\)")
